[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a white and brown animal-like face or mask with a patterned head covering, with large text reading “GELAKJAVA” at the bottom.

The main subject is a stylized face that appears to have a white base with dark brown areas around the eyes and muzzle, topped by a rounded cap or cloth with an orange-brown pattern and darker repeating lines.

Setting: The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting an indoor or studio-like setting, with no clear weather or time of day visible.

Visual Details: The camera is tightly framed on the face, with the patterned head covering occupying the top portion of the image. Lighting is dim and soft, creating muted shadows and low contrast. The text “GELAKJAVA” is displayed prominently in bold, white uppercase letters with a black outline inside a black rectangular bar at the bottom.

Visible Text: GELAKJAVA

Practical Summary: The image shows a close-up of a stylized animal-like face wearing a patterned cap. It includes bold text at the bottom that reads “GELAKJAVA.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
